name: HARD-RULES-1
title: main session silently deleted committed stale code from plan without user approval
description: During 2026-05-09 workflow hardening session, the main session noticed leftover duplicate function definitions in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-09-workflow-hardening.md (lines 1109-1162, a stale artifact from an earlier edit). Instead of flagging the issue to the user, it silently deleted the block and committed. This violates work-guide Rule 6 (Surgical Changes): 'If you notice unrelated dead code, mention it -- do not delete it.' Root cause: the 'clean up your own mess' exception was misapplied to previously committed artifacts.

history.note: work-guide.md section 6 clarified: exception boundary now explicit (uncommitted edits only)
